Our Clients

From boutique hotels to national chains, our clients trust Zucchetti North America to streamline operations, drive revenue, and elevate guest experiences.

Get Started

Who We Serve

At Zucchetti North America, we work with a diverse range of hospitality and retail businesses across the U.S. and Canada. Our clients include independent properties and large enterprises alike, from charming lakeside inns to multi-location hotel groups, vibrant campgrounds, luxury marinas, and fast-paced restaurant chains.

No matter your size or complexity, our integrated technology suite adapts to your needs, helping you simplify operations, unify systems, and better serve your guests.

Industries We Support

Hospitality

Hotels, resorts, boutique properties, luxury inns, and extended-stay accommodations

Vacation & Outdoor

Campgrounds, RV parks, marinas, vacation rentals, and hospitality houses

Retail & Foodservice

Restaurants, cafés, shops, stadium concessions, and hospital cafeterias

Multi-Property Operations

Hotel groups, branded chains, franchise operators, and regional portfolios

Trusted by Properties and Operators Across North America

Client Success Stories

“My experience with Vertical Booking can be summarized as unified control and proactive assistance.
The centralization of pricing, revenue automation, and exceptional Customer Service – always ready to guide you and suggest new avenues – make for an experience that exceeds expectations.”

Riccardo ComandiHotel Revenue Manager

“I have been a loyal customer of Lodgical Solution for more than 25 years. I can proudly say that the team has been invaluable to me, my staff and the resort. I say this in testament of my many years in the hospitality industry. The is excellent for support and listening to suggested changes in the software and then implementing those changes and new ideas. I also love the fully integrated POS.
Thank you, Bay Lakes. I would never consider using any other Property Management System.”

Adam MakowskiGeneral Manager

“Lodgical Solution has kept our reservations organized and secure. It has gone through many growth changes over the years, which has enhanced the accounting reports, streamlined reservation processing, and added online reservation processing and credit card processing. Yet remains focused on helping its customers directly. There are other reservation software companies out there. But why change when we have one of the best, most progressive companies right here in Door County.”

Sue ShermanOwner

“We use Lodgical Solution for regular day-to-day reservations and trust the rotation system to keep things fair for our owners. The reporting features are terrific for property management and accountability to our board. We are happy with the E-Registration and PCI-compliant credit card processing. The staff at is always helpful and answers our questions in a prompt and accurate manner.”

Denise StillmanForemost Management Services, Inc.

“We have been using Lodgical Solution for many years. They strive to stay current, have excellent help and are also very easy to use. We are a small business and it works really well for us. I would definitely recommend it.”

Sarah SawyerOwner

“J R Vacation Rentals has been working with Logical for the past 14 years and has been very pleased with the service we have received. I would highly recommend them for your reservation needs.”

Pam JornsOwner

“Since adopting Lybra, we’ve reduced manual workload, increased pricing agility, and allowed our team to focus more on strategy and long-term revenue growth.”

Malinee SkinnerCorporate Director of Revenue - Chatrium Hotels & Residences, Asia

“We’ve observed clear improvements in both ADR and RevPAR, especially during peak periods. The system also helped us manage rate disparities and last-minute opportunities more efficiently, resulting in stronger topline growth.”

Tolga DumanReservation Manager at The Marmara Pera, Suadiye & Çamlıca

“We moved from fixed pricing to a dynamic pricing strategy
This shift has led to better occupancy rates and approximately a 15% revenue improvement in the first full year
The team is always accessible and highly competent
Excellent support – we truly feel guided and in good hands”

Mark KerkhoffDirector, Hotel Scheck

“In our daily work, many time-consuming tasks such as price monitoring or market analysis have been automated. This allows us to focus more on strategy and less on routine activities. Thanks to up-to-date market data, we can react more quickly to changes, and with the automated suggestions or Autopilot mode, we can ensure faster response and processing times.
On a strategic level, we are able to develop long-term pricing strategies and, thanks to competitor analysis, more efficiently adjust our positioning and pricing strategy. Additionally, the system identifies trends and increases in market demand, allowing us to respond promptly.”

Claudia MendeHotel Manager

“I’m satisfied beyond any expectation… Helpdesk is precise and useful for any request. I recommend it! Well done.”

Nicola SicherPineta Hotels, Coredo

“Superlative Service. We have just started this new adventure and everything is great.”

Gianluca Borgna,Grand Hotel & La Pace, Montecatini

“Simple Booking is complete and easy to use. I can definitely say that just a few booking engines could compare with it worldwide.”

Federico PaciniHotel Artemide, Roma

“Easy to use for customers and easily available from any PC, smartphone and tablet. Great reliability in solving problems and to meet our needs. The most important part: we tripled sales. Thanks, Simple Booking.”

Alen KrezicMedjugorje Hotel & Spa, Medjugorje

“Great tool. A big thank you goes to all the helpdesk team!”

Alen KrezicMichele Ghezzo, Hotel Moresco, Venice

Why Our Clients
Stay with Us

  • One integrated tech stack – PMS, CRS, POS, RMS, IBE, and more
  • Highly configurable solutions tailored to each property’s operations
  • U.S.-based implementation & support teams that understand your market
  • Ongoing innovation driven by customer feedback and market needs
  • Proven experience across hospitality, retail, and foodservice industries

We don’t just install software—we help you thrive.

Contact Us

North America

Zucchetti North America offers hospitality solutions to hotels and other lodging providers, as well as on-site dining operations across North America.
